title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Honeywell India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Honeywell India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Honeywell India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Honeywell India:
Honeywell India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honeywell India!
